contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Sophia auto-advance roadmap + live-progress cross-process fix
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/542
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/241
  
  Details:
  Designed and drafted SOPHIA_AUTO_ADVANCE_PLAN.md (merged, agentic_ai_context#542): Sophia auto-advances through a handoff plan's PRs without a human prompt between each, pausing only at explicit Advance-column gates (auto | gate:<reason>), on failure, on completion, or a runaway cap — keeping one-PR-per-turn round-cap discipline now that context compaction (CM0-CM4) keeps multi-turn threads bounded. Diagnosed why SOPHIA_LIVE_PROGRESS_PLAN never worked despite #160/#161/#163 merging: two cross-process bugs between the Telegram adapter and the FastAPI brain (in-process _live_progress read in the ack; /chat/progress requiring X-Public-Key while the adapter sends a Bearer JWT). Fixed both in truesight_autopilot#241 (adapter fetches over HTTP; /chat/progress accepts the JWT and keys the session like /chat) with tests; 533 unit tests pass.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 100.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
